message:
beads(context-continuity): Add comprehensive context continuity beads for CC-v3 integration

This commit adds 11 interconnected beads implementing the "Compound, don't
compact" methodology from Continuous-Claude-v3 for context window management:

EPIC: bd-khux0 - Context Continuity System
├── bd-4gaaz - Types package (Handoff, status enums, validation)
├── bd-j44fa - Writer with atomic writes and rotation policies
├── bd-2rf60 - Reader with mod-time cache and error handling
├── bd-2f6wa - Generator with multi-agent transcript parsing
├── bd-whspn - Pre-compact trigger (75% default threshold)
├── bd-1wtja - Session-start context restoration
├── bd-1nf6l - ntm handoff CLI (create/list/show)
├── bd-3kthl - ntm resume CLI (spawn/inject/dry-run)
├── bd-2bgij - Dashboard status integration
└── bd-18kw9 - Comprehensive test suite

Key design decisions extracted from CC-v3:
- YAML handoffs (~400 tokens vs ~2000 markdown) for efficiency
- Token detection: file_size / 4 estimation
- Context thresholds: 70% warning, 75% trigger, 85% critical
- Atomic writes: temp file → sync → rename pattern
- Recovery context types with priority ordering
- "Compound, don't compact" - extract before clear, reload fresh

Each bead includes:
- Detailed acceptance criteria
- Comprehensive test specifications
- Logging requirements (DEBUG/INFO/WARN/ERROR levels)
- Integration points with existing systems (CM, Agent Mail, BV)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
